ddls:
CREATE TABLE "filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity making the filing */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the filing */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the filing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the filing (e.g., Filed, Pending, Overdue) */,
  "late_fees" REAL /* Amount of late fees incurred */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the filing is due */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date when the filing was made */,
  "tax_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of tax */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* The total amount of tax due */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* The amount of tax paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* The date when the tax was paid */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the filing */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_tax_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_type_id") REFERENCES tax_types ("tax_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_types" (
  "tax_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax type */,
  "tax_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax type */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* The geographic or legal jurisdiction where the tax type applies */,
  "rate" REAL /* The tax rate for the tax type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the document */,
  "document_hash" TEXT /* A hash of the document for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_documents_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log entry (e.g., Update, Correction) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the log entry */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* The old value of the field that was changed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The new value of the field that was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_logs_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, auditor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "affected_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity affected by the action */,
  "affected_filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing affected by the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_affected_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("affected_filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., Reminder, Alert) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the notification (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
